description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, dark glass touchscreen with a small circular button at the bottom and a speaker grille and camera at the top. The back is matte black with a single camera lens and flash in the upper left corner, and faint text or branding near the bottom. The sides are thin and smooth, with no visible buttons or ports, emphasizing a minimalist design. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with a solid, compact build. Its overall appearance is typical of contemporary mobile phones found in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen and a single rear camera. The design is minimalist, with smooth sides and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black glass screen, a circular button at the bottom, and a speaker grille and camera at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slim thickness and smooth, uninterrupted edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a matte black surface, a single camera and flash in the top left corner, and faint branding near the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thinness and lack of visible buttons or ports.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and appears to be turned off, with no visible icons, wallpaper, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens and flash are located in the top left corner on the back of the device. There is also a small front-facing camera above the screen, centered.
attribute_button_layout: A single circular button is visible below the screen on the front. No other physical buttons are visible on the sides or back.
